name: monitor
description: Monitor your Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode sessions: a usage dashboard plus a per-project cockpit with a decision trail, live transcript, needs-your-call bridge, and thoughtful auto-logging.

interface.shortDescription: Usage dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode + session cockpit.
interface.longDescription: A usage dashboard that visualizes Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode sessions, tokens, cost, and model mix; plus a per-project cockpit for auto-logging decisions that diffs cannot explain, streaming live transcripts, and handing needs_your_call choices back to the user.
defaultPrompt: Show my Claude Code usage dashboard.
